items.name: The Silver Eye
items.description:
A rare and powerful artifact implanted into the left eye, The Silver Eye unlocks abilities such as immortality, youth, soul manipulation, and time distortion. The Shelter Kids Policy sought to harness its power, but the process failed. Each Silver Eye carries a legacy of ancient and forbidden abilities.
